scenes.description: Transition and ending of previous performance segment.

subtitles.original: さよならメモリーズ
subtitles.english: Sayonara Memories

subtitles.original: #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 ～Liminal～
subtitles.english: #Momosuzu Nene Birthday Live 2026 ~Liminal~

subtitles.original:
♪ ODDS&ENDS
作詞・作曲・編曲：ryo (supercell)
歌：桃鈴ねね
subtitles.english:
♪ ODDS&ENDS
Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement: ryo (supercell)
Vocals: Momosuzu Nene

subtitles.original: いつだって君は笑われ者だ
subtitles.english: You've always been a laughingstock

subtitles.original: やることなすことツイてなくて
subtitles.english: Nothing you do ever goes right

subtitles.original: 挙げ句に雨に降られ
subtitles.english: And to top it off, you get rained on

subtitles.original: お気に入りの傘は風で飛んでって
subtitles.english: Your favorite umbrella gets blown away by the wind

subtitles.original: そこの野良は「ご苦労様」と
subtitles.english: And a stray cat there says "Good luck with that"

subtitles.original: 足をふんづけてった
subtitles.english: As it steps on your foot

subtitles.original: いつも通り君は嫌われ者だ
subtitles.english: As usual, you're an outcast

subtitles.original: 何にもせずとも遠ざけられて
subtitles.english: Avoided by everyone without even doing anything

subtitles.original: 努力をしてみるけれど
subtitles.english: Even though you try your best

subtitles.original: その理由なんて「何となく」で
subtitles.english: For no particular reason

subtitles.original: 君は途方に暮れて悲しんでた
subtitles.english: You were at a loss and feeling sad

subtitles.original: ならあたしの声を使えばいいよ
subtitles.english: Well then, you should just use my voice

subtitles.original: 人によっては理解不能で
subtitles.english: To some people, it's unintelligible

subtitles.original: 「なんて耳障り、ひどい声だ」って
subtitles.english: They say "What an eyesore, what a terrible voice"

subtitles.original: 言われるけど
subtitles.english: But even so

subtitles.original: きっと君の力になれる
subtitles.english: I'm sure I can be your strength

subtitles.original: だからあたしを歌わせてみて
subtitles.english: So try making me sing

subtitles.original: そう君の、君だけの言葉でさ
subtitles.english: With your, and only your, words

subtitles.original: 綴って 連ねて
subtitles.english: Spelling them out, lining them up

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉を叫ぶから
subtitles.english: Because I will scream those words

subtitles.original: 描いて 理想を
subtitles.english: Sketching out your ideals

subtitles.original: その思いは誰にも触れさせない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch those feelings

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして響く
subtitles.english: And then the junk's voice resonates

subtitles.original: ありのままを不器用につないで
subtitles.english: Connecting things just as they are, awkwardly

subtitles.original: 目一杯に声を上げる
subtitles.english: Raising its voice to the fullest

subtitles.original: いつからか君は人気者だ
subtitles.english: At some point, you became popular

subtitles.original: たくさんの人にもてはやされ
subtitles.english: Being flattered by many people

subtitles.original: あたしも鼻が高い
subtitles.english: I'm proud of you too

subtitles.original: でもいつからか君は変わった
subtitles.english: But at some point, you changed

subtitles.original: 冷たくなって、だけど寂しそうだった
subtitles.english: You became cold, but you looked lonely

subtitles.original: 「もう機械の声なんてたくさんだ
subtitles.english: "I've had enough of a machine's voice"

subtitles.original: 僕は僕自身なんだよ」って
subtitles.english: "I am myself!"

subtitles.original: ついに君は抑えきれなくなって
subtitles.english: Finally, you couldn't hold it back anymore

subtitles.original: あたしを嫌った
subtitles.english: And you hated me

subtitles.original: 君の後ろで誰かが言う
subtitles.english: Behind your back, someone says

subtitles.original: 「虎の威を借る狐のくせに」
subtitles.english: "Even though you're just a fox borrowing the tiger's authority"

subtitles.original: ねぇ君は 一人で泣いてたんだね
subtitles.english: Hey, you were crying all alone, weren't you?

subtitles.original: 聴こえる？ この声
subtitles.english: Can you hear it? This voice

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉をかき消すから
subtitles.english: Because I will drown out those words

subtitles.original: 分かってる 本当は
subtitles.english: I know, the truth is

subtitles.original: 君が誰より優しいってことを
subtitles.english: That you are kinder than anyone else

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして歌った
subtitles.english: And then the junk's voice sang

subtitles.original: 他の誰でもない君のために
subtitles.english: For you, and no one else

subtitles.original: 軋んでく 限界を超えて
subtitles.english: Creaking, crossing the limits

subtitles.original: 二人はどれだけたくさんの
subtitles.english: How many countless words

subtitles.original: 言葉を思いついたことだろう
subtitles.english: Could the two of us have come up with?

subtitles.original: だけど今は何一つ思いつかなくて
subtitles.english: But now I can't think of a single one

subtitles.original: だけど何もかも分かった
subtitles.english: But I understood everything

subtitles.original: 「そうか、きっとこれは夢だ
subtitles.english: "I see, this must be a dream"

subtitles.original: 永遠に醒めない、
subtitles.english: A dream that I'll never wake up from,

subtitles.original: 君と会えた、そんな夢」
subtitles.english: Where I met you

subtitles.original: ガラクタは幸せそうな顔をしたまま
subtitles.english: The junk, with a happy look on its face

subtitles.original: どれだけ呼んでももう動かない
subtitles.english: Won't move anymore, no matter how much you call

subtitles.original: 望んだはずの結末に
subtitles.english: At the conclusion you should have wanted,

subtitles.original: 君は泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: You cry out

subtitles.original: 「嘘だろ、嘘だろ」ってそう泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: "It's a lie, it's a lie!" you cry out like that

subtitles.original: 「僕は無力だ
subtitles.english: "I am powerless"

subtitles.original: ガラクタ一つだって救えやしない」
subtitles.english: "I can't even save a single piece of junk"

subtitles.original: 想いは...
subtitles.english: My feelings...
